target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Tank is actively moving, tracks are engaged, no visible holes, scorching, or missing components; snow covers surface but does not obscure structural integrity.

summary: One military equipment target assessed: 1 tank with NO DAMAGE confirmed. The scene depicts a single tank actively moving across a snowy, open field, kicking up snow and dirt as it advances. Based on the prior assessment, the tank is operational and functional.
